headline: Exxon Mobil (XOM) Price Target Reduced Amid War Impact
summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) is included among the 12 Most Undervalued Natural Gas Stocks to Buy Now. Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) is one of the largest integrated fuels, lubricants, and chemical companies in the world. On April 10, TD Cowen lowered its price target on Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) from $175 to $172, but maintained […]

headline: American Oil Is Having Its Moment. IYE Is the Simplest Way to Own All of It
summary: The global energy map has been redrawn in weeks. With the Strait of Hormuz effectively closed since late February and U.S.-Iran peace talks collapsing in Islamabad, American oil producers are the unexpected beneficiaries of a geopolitical shock. For investors who want clean exposure to that moment, iShares U.S. Energy ETF (NYSEARCA:IYE) is about as direct ... American Oil Is Having Its Moment. IYE Is the Simplest Way to Own All of It

headline: 'Firing on all cylinders': Wall Street strategists expect a strong quarter of earnings growth
summary: As big banks kick off earnings season, strategists say the "dominant theme" for investors is shifting back to Big Tech and energy.

headline: Exxon Mobil Faces Kazakhstan Fine And Golden Pass LNG Setbacks
summary: A Kazakhstan court upholds a US$5b environmental fine against North Caspian Operating Co., a joint venture that includes Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM). Exxon Mobil withdraws initial LNG cargoes from the new Golden Pass export plant following start-up issues. Exxon Mobil, one of the largest integrated oil and gas companies, is now dealing with two very different types of challenges across its global portfolio. The upheld US$5b environmental penalty tied to the North Caspian Operating Co. joint...
